EmailTemplate.description: Email to be used when renewals team have been unable to speak with a customer at the first attempt stage.
EmailTemplate.name: Renewal Quote GENERIC
EmailTemplate.subject: Your business insurance is up for renewal
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thanks for being a Kingsbridge customer!
Your business insurance policy is coming up for renewal and I have been trying to get hold of you.
I'd like to run through your quote with you over the phone, to make sure it meets your current business needs. Is there a good time for me to speak with you?
Alternatively, you can contact me on 01242 808 740. Our office is open between the hours of 8:00am-5:30pm, Monday-Friday.
I look forward to hearing from you.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
